# Sprite Color Palette Reference

Primary sprite palette:

- `#4a3f35`, `#6e5e4f`, `#8a7968` (stone/ruin)
- `#4d3212`, `#6b4324`, `#8b5d2d` (wood/leather)
- `#6f5c3f`, `#8a7450` (metal/chain)
- `#ff9a3b`, `#ffd16e`, `#fff5b7` (fire)
- `#345f35`, `#4f8f4f`, `#5fa35e` (moss/organic)
- `#e8d8b0`, `#b48659`, `#5e3f16`, `#c8860a` (player tones)

Rule: add new colors only when needed for readability; prefer reusing this set.
